languages.text: "У меня есть дела поважнее. Уберите всех с мостика, пусть займутся своими прямыми обязанностями".

traits.locale_text: "У меня есть дела поважнее. Уберите их с мостика, пусть займутся своими прямыми обязанностями".

languages.text: "I have more pressing matters to attend to. Get everyone off my bridge and back to their direct duties."
languages.original_text: "У меня есть дела поважнее. Уберите всех с мостика, пусть займутся своими прямыми обязанностями".

traits.locale_text: "I have more pressing matters to attend to. Get everyone off my bridge and back to their direct duties."
"I have more pressing matters to attend to. Get everyone off my bridge and back to their direct duties."
"I have more pressing matters to attend to. Get everyone off my bridge and back to their direct duties."

languages.text: 「もっと重要な仕事がある。みんなを橋から引き離して、それぞれの担当業務に戻れ」
languages.original_text: "I have more pressing matters to attend to. Get everyone off my bridge and back to their direct duties."

languages.text: "İlgilenmem gereken daha acil meseleler var. Herkesi köprümden çıkarın ve doğrudan görevlerinin başına döndürün."
languages.original_text: "I have more pressing matters to attend to. Get everyone off my bridge and back to their direct duties."

traits.locale_text: "İlgilenmem gereken daha acil meseleler var. Herkesi köprümden çıkarın ve doğrudan görevlerinin başına döndürün."

languages.text: “我还有更紧迫的事要处理。让所有人离开舰桥，回到各自岗位上去。”
languages.original_text: "I have more pressing matters to attend to. Get everyone off my bridge and back to their direct duties."

traits.locale_text: “我还有更紧迫的事要处理。让所有人离开舰桥，回到各自岗位上去。”

languages.text: "Ich muss mich um wichtigere Angelegenheiten kümmern. Schafft diese Leute von meiner Brücke und schickt sie zurück an ihre Arbeit."
languages.original_text: "I have more pressing matters to attend to. Get everyone off my bridge and back to their direct duties."

traits.locale_text: "Ich muss mich um wichtigere Angelegenheiten kümmern. Schafft diese Leute von meiner Brücke und schickt sie zurück an ihre Arbeit."

languages.text: « J'ai des questions plus urgentes à traiter. Faites évacuer ma passerelle et renvoyez tout ce petit monde à son poste. »
languages.original_text: "I have more pressing matters to attend to. Get everyone off my bridge and back to their direct duties."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai des questions plus urgentes à traiter. Faites évacuer ma passerelle et renvoyez tout ce petit monde à son poste. »

languages.text: «Tengo asuntos más acuciantes que atender. Que todo el mundo se vaya del puente y vuelva a sus labores».
languages.original_text: "I have more pressing matters to attend to. Get everyone off my bridge and back to their direct duties."

traits.locale_text: «Tengo asuntos más acuciantes que atender. Que todo el mundo se vaya del puente y vuelva a sus labores».
